message:
🐛 Fix cluster showing Offline when kc-agent token not shared (#11129)

* � Fix cluster showing Offline when kc-agent token not shared

Three-pronged fix for #11120:

1. start-dev.sh: Generate and export KC_AGENT_TOKEN before starting
   kc-agent and the backend, ensuring both share the same secret
   (mirrors startup-oauth.sh behavior).

2. Frontend (shared.ts): Add negative caching to getAgentToken() so
   failed/empty token fetches are remembered for 30s instead of
   re-attempting the 5s timeout on every agentFetch call. Revert the
   local-agent token skip from #11124 — with negative caching the
   token fetch no longer blocks.

3. Backend (kc-agent): When KC_AGENT_TOKEN is NOT explicitly set
   (auto-generated), allow requests from trusted browser origins
   without a token. Since kc-agent binds to loopback only, CORS is
   the effective access control for browser clients. This handles
   standalone usage (e.g. Windows) where the token can't be shared.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: set tokenExplicit=true in test Server literals with explicit agentToken

Test helpers that construct Server{} directly with a non-empty agentToken
were missing tokenExplicit: true. Because tokenExplicit defaults to false,
the origin-based bypass introduced in #11120 was firing in tests, allowing
unauthenticated requests from trusted origins and causing:

  TestEndpointAuth_SensitiveEndpointsRejectWithoutToken
  TestHandleExec_Unauthorized
  TestHandler_MissingBearerToken_401

to fail (got 200/503 instead of 401).

Fix: set tokenExplicit: true wherever a test directly initialises agentToken
to a non-empty value (endpoint_auth_test.go, server_exec_test.go, and
newTestServer in server_federation_test.go).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -206,6 +206,14 @@ if [ -z "$KC_AGENT_BIN" ]; then
     fi
 fi
 
+# Generate KC_AGENT_TOKEN if not already set — both kc-agent and the Go
+# backend must share the same secret so the frontend can authenticate.
+if [ -z "${KC_AGENT_TOKEN:-}" ]; then
+    KC_AGENT_TOKEN="$(openssl rand -hex 32 2>/dev/null || head -c 32 /dev/urandom | xxd -p 2>/dev/null || cat /dev/urandom | tr -dc 'a-f0-9' | head -c 64)"
+    echo "Auto-generated KC_AGENT_TOKEN for this session."
+fi
+export KC_AGENT_TOKEN
+
 # Start kc-agent and verify it is running
 AGENT_PID=""
 AGENT_RUNNING=false
